commands.name: hooks
commands.description: Inspect loaded builtin hook sources and diagnostics.

commands.name: sessions
commands.description: Peek at previous session transcripts in a HUD

commands.name: nested-agents
commands.description: Toggle the nested AGENTS.md context widget and dump cache state.

commands.description: Reload pi-rules for the current session.

commands.name: goal
commands.description: Set, inspect, pause, resume, or clear the persistent goal

commands.description: Inspect the Codex app-server adapter runtime status

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Show git changes and open in VS Code diff view

commands.name: files
commands.description: Show files read/written/edited in this session
